subject: Refactor SOL003 Adapter to organize its modules
commit_message:
Refactor SOL003 Adapter to organize its modules

based on functions

Change-Id: I10b2376a552272ac3b405b2dae718adcb7e1e489
Issue-ID: SO-2771
Signed-off-by: waqas.ikram <waqas.ikram@est.tech>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
Uploaded patch set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

No Builds Executed

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 2:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/4072/

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/4072/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-master-verify-java/4072
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2:

@Seshu, this is based on our agreement

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

@Seshu, Miroslaw, Piotr, this refactoring is based on our agreement on the ETSI adapter naming convention for Guilin: etsi-sol003-adapter and etsi-sol003-adapter. 
This code change is for the 1st phase. After this, we plan to make changes for the 2nd phase. In the 2nd phase, we plan to change the package names, readme, security and others.
Thanks.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)
Uploaded patch set 3.
